ASR Federal Bifold Leather ID Card Shield Badge Holder Police Gear Smooth Black

Easy to carry on the daily or take with you when you're traveling for training, the ASR Federal police badge ID holder wallet is the perfect size for carrying your minimal but most important credentials when on duty. This police badge holder features a ID slot with clear vinyl covering and recessed badge cut-out design, allowing your police badge to fit seamlessly without any extra added bulk.

The ASR Federal Genuine Leather Police ID Badge Holder is compact and low profile, specifically designed to hold a police badge without feeling the bulk of the badge itself. This ID badge holder is ideal for officers while on duty, as its minimalist design only has room to hold your badge and department issued credentials with no other personal identifying items to carry. The recessed badge compartment keeps the ID badge holder profile minimal and compact; an area for cash or cards is excluded in this design, reducing excess bulk and unneeded personal identification while operating in the field.

Key Features

  • POLICE BADGE HOLDER WALLET: Designed for carrying police badges and department issued ID credentials for officers while on duty, there is no credit card compartment. Only a clear ID slot and a recessed badge insert with suede protector flap
  • RECESSED POLICE BADGE DESIGN: Badge case has a minimal and compact low profile design due to the badge cut-out inlay; the badge attachment is a clip back pin style so no screws are required
  • QUALITY LEATHER: This leather police badge holder boasts strong and sturdy construction, made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather for long last lasting durability
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Wallet size: 3.5” x 4.5" (W x H); Maximum Card Size: 2.75” x 4”; Color: Black; Badge attachment is clip-back pin (no screws required); Badge Size: 3.18" x 2.23"
  • NOTE: Police ID Badge is NOT included with purchase

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BC-1111
  • UPC: 810131704995
  • Color: Black

This law enforcement badge credential holder boasts a strong and sturdy construction, made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather for long-lasting durability. This particular book-style police badge holder wallet is compact, featuring a simple and straightforward bi-fold design with smooth turned edges and round corners. Over time, the police badge holder wallet case will soften and mold to your belongings and police badge, without compromising on the quality construction, shape or finish.

Available in shield, oval or round badge cut-outs.

Badge attachment is clip-back pin, no screws required.

Maximum ID Size: 2.75 x 4 inches.

NOTE: Police Badge is NOT included with purchase.
